summary: Comprehensive regression testing of refactored Darts Kiosk backend. All 32 API tests passed. WebSocket broadcasts working. Frontend dashboard shows 'Live' WS indicator. /admin/system page renders all 4 tabs (Backups, Updates, Logs, Details). The 1434-line server.py was successfully split into routers/, schemas.py, dependencies.py with NO behavior changes.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns API info with mode
POST /api/auth/login with admin/admin123 returns token + user
GET /api/auth/me returns current user (username, role, id)
GET /api/users returns user list (admin only) - 2+ users
GET /api/boards/BOARD-1 returns board detail with session field
POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/lock cancels session and locks board
GET /api/settings/palettes returns array of palette themes
GET /api/revenue/summary returns revenue data with by_date breakdown
GET /api/health/detailed returns detailed health (db, scheduler status)
GET /api/system/info returns version, uptime, disk, mode info
GET /api/backups returns backup list with stats
WebSocket receives broadcast on unlock: {event: 'board_status', data: {board_id, status: 'unlocked'}}
WebSocket receives broadcast on lock: {event: 'board_status', data: {board_id, status: 'locked'}}
/admin/system page renders with 4 overview cards (Version, Uptime, Festplatte, Modus)
/admin/system has 4 tabs: Backups, Updates, Logs, Details - all clickable
Backups tab shows 31 backups with download/restore/delete buttons
Details tab shows system info: Hostname, Betriebssystem, Python, disk stats
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring is clean - server.py reduced from 1434 to ~220 lines
All routers properly use /api prefix through api_router
WebSocket endpoint kept in server.py (correct - it needs direct app access)
Dependencies properly extracted with auth, password hashing, token management
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing admin/staff users and BOARD-1/BOARD-2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring complete and verified. server.py split into: routers/auth.py, routers/boards.py, routers/kiosk.py, routers/settings.py, routers/admin.py, routers/backups.py, routers/updates.py, routers/agent.py + schemas.py + dependencies.py. All API behavior identical to pre-refactor. Backend uses SQLite (not MongoDB). German localization throughout UI.
